title: Day 10 Reflection
description: Solidify list rendering and filtering before Day 11 infinite scroll.

prompts.question: Walk through your filter pipeline: how do category, price, search, and sort combine into the final product list?
prompts.guidance: Mention filter, sort, and whether you used useMemo.

prompts.question: Why is using index as key dangerous when the list can be sorted or filtered?
prompts.guidance: Connect to React reconciliation and component identity.

prompts.question: When did you apply React.memo and what props did ProductCard receive?
prompts.guidance: Explain what triggers a re-render despite memo.

prompts.question: Did you mutate the products array anywhere? How did you avoid it?
prompts.guidance: Mention spread, slice, or filter returning new arrays.

prompts.question: How is today's client-side filtering different from Day 09 server-side search?
prompts.guidance: Trade-offs: data size, latency, API design.
